data.title: RedCloud (Nasdaq: RCT) partners with NVIDIA Connect to revolutionize global trade operations with RedAI platform.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, RedCloud Holdings plc (Nasdaq: RCT) revealed its partnership with the NVIDIA Connect program to enhance the RedAI trading platform designed for Fast Moving Consumer Goods (“FMCG”) supply chains. RedCloud aims to introduce a new operating system for global trade through this collaboration.
Birchtech signs license deal with major regional power utility.

data.title: Star Equity Holdings' Hudson Talent Solutions has been on HRO Today's Baker's Dozen List for 17 years, reflecting positive views from HR decision makers.
data.description: The yearly client satisfaction survey has gathered feedback from senior HR decision makers, providing insights into their views on the services provided. Key numbers revealed in the survey include satisfaction ratings averaging at 85%, along with a notable increase in positive feedback regarding recruitment processes, which jumped to 92% from the previous year's 78%. This survey underscores the importance of understanding and meeting the needs of senior HR professionals in the industry.

data.title: Pet Wellbeing in Vancouver has received the NASC Quality Seal for commitment to holistic pet support.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on September 24, 2025, Pet Wellbeing, a company specializing in holistic supplements for pets for over 25 years, has received the prestigious NASC Quality Seal. This recognition highlights their dedication to ensuring safety, quality, and transparency in their products aimed at enhancing pets' well-being.

data.title: Montana Silversmiths appoints Jade Opfer as new CEO, leading the 50+ year old brand into a new era.
data.description: In Columbus, Montana on September 24, 2025, Montana Silversmiths, a prominent manufacturer of Western buckles, jewelry, and lifestyle accessories, has revealed Jade Opfer as the new Chief Executive Officer. With over 50 years of experience, the company appointed Opfer to lead its operations going forward.

data.title: HawkEye 360 names Craig Searle as CFO, previously Chief Business Officer. Va.-based global leader in signals intelligence.
data.description: Herndon, VA - On September 24, 2025, HawkEye 360, a prominent signals intelligence data and analytics company, revealed the appointment of Craig Searle as its new Chief Financial Officer. Prior to this role, Craig held the position of Chief Business Officer within the company. This move comes at a crucial time as HawkEye 360 continues to expand its operations and solidify its position as a global leader in the industry.

data.title: Sigma360 introduces Transaction Screening to process high-volume payments in real-time with exceptional accuracy, reducing alert volumes.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, Sigma360® revealed the launch of its latest product, Transaction Screening, as part of its AI-powered risk screening and monitoring platform. This new offering is capable of analyzing hundreds of millions of transactions simultaneously in real time, effectively reducing alert volumes.

data.title: Aeries Tech sees major client expansion, aiming for $12M+ annual run-rate by year-end. Strengthened growth from September plan.
data.description: Increased engagement across multiple functions confirms the success of the expansion plan announced on September 4, resulting in a boost to recurring growth.
